name: Keychain Access - macOS Credential Extraction
description: Detects macOS Keychain credential extraction using security command, chainbreaker, or direct keychain file access. Covers find-generic-password, dump-keychain, and keychain unlock operations.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name == "security" and process.args : ("find-generic-password", "find-internet-password", "dump-keychain", "unlock-keychain")) or process.args : "chainbreaker" or process.args : ("*login.keychain*", "*System.keychain*", "*.keychain-db*"))
